message.content:
@startuml
actor ShipCaptain
participant ":System" as System

ShipCaptain -> System : 1 ask the system to see how much the vessel sink
ShipCaptain <-- System : 2 ask the ship's captain to the ship data to indentify and the voyage id to know the total of containers
ShipCaptain -> System : 3 introduces the data asked
System -> System : 4 get the ship and the voyage and make all calculation
ShipCaptain <-- System : 5 shows the results and informs the success of the operation

@enduml
